title: HubSpot Association IDs
description: Directional association mappings for HubSpot Lists API and other endpoints
note: Association IDs are DIRECTIONAL - Contact→Company (279) is different from Company→Contact (280)

contact_to_company.name: Contact to Company
contact_to_company.description: Used when filtering contacts by company properties
examples: Filter contacts where associated company's industry = 'Technology'
List API: Use 279 for contact lists with company property filters

company_to_contact.name: Company to Contact
company_to_contact.description: Used when filtering companies by contact properties
examples: Filter companies where associated contact's lifecycle stage = 'Customer'
List API: Use 280 for company lists with contact property filters

contact_to_deal.name: Contact to Deal
contact_to_deal.description: Used when filtering contacts by deal properties

deal_to_contact.name: Deal to Contact
deal_to_contact.description: Used when filtering deals by contact properties

company_to_deal.name: Company to Deal
company_to_deal.description: Used when filtering companies by deal properties

deal_to_company.name: Deal to Company
deal_to_company.description: Used when filtering deals by company properties

contact_to_ticket.name: Contact to Ticket
contact_to_ticket.description: Used when filtering contacts by ticket properties

ticket_to_contact.name: Ticket to Contact
ticket_to_contact.description: Used when filtering tickets by contact properties

company_to_ticket.name: Company to Ticket
company_to_ticket.description: Used when filtering companies by ticket properties

ticket_to_company.name: Ticket to Company
ticket_to_company.description: Used when filtering tickets by company properties

deal_to_line_item.name: Deal to Line Item
deal_to_line_item.description: Used when filtering deals by line item properties

line_item_to_deal.name: Line Item to Deal
line_item_to_deal.description: Used when filtering line items by deal properties

contact_to_engagement.name: Contact to Engagement
contact_to_engagement.description: Used when filtering contacts by engagement (email, call, meeting) properties

company_to_engagement.name: Company to Engagement
company_to_engagement.description: Used when filtering companies by engagement properties

deal_to_engagement.name: Deal to Engagement
deal_to_engagement.description: Used when filtering deals by engagement properties

ticket_to_engagement.name: Ticket to Engagement
ticket_to_engagement.description: Used when filtering tickets by engagement properties

common_mistakes.mistake: Using 280 (Company→Contact) when filtering contacts by company properties
common_mistakes.example: List API filtering contacts: associationTypeId should be 279

common_mistakes.mistake: Using 279 (Contact→Company) when filtering companies by contact properties
common_mistakes.example: List API filtering companies: associationTypeId should be 280

common_mistakes.correct: Always check direction: FROM object → TO object
common_mistakes.example: Contact TO Company (279) ≠ Company TO Contact (280)

contact_list_with_company_filter.description: Filtering contacts based on company properties

company_list_with_contact_filter.description: Filtering companies based on contact properties
